name: OverlayForm
gotchas:
A missing Model no longer fails silently: the EditContext is still
    deferred (EditForm crashes on a null Model + null EditContext), but instead of
    an invisible empty shell the component now renders a dev-visible diagnostic
    so the misconfiguration is obvious during development.

api.name: OverlayForm

parameters.name: Validator
parameters.description: Override the default DataAnnotationsValidator with a custom validator (e.g. FluentValidationValidator).

gotchas:
A missing Model no longer fails silently: the EditContext is still
    deferred (EditForm crashes on a null Model + null EditContext), but instead of
    an invisible empty shell the component now renders a dev-visible diagnostic
    so the misconfiguration is obvious during development.

examples.title: Basic Overlay Form
examples.code:
<OverlayForm Model="@_model" OnValidSubmit="HandleSave">
    <Header>
        <Heading Level="3" Class="text-base font-semibold">Edit contact</Heading>
    </Header>
    <Body>
        <Stack Gap="4">
            <Label>Name</Label>
            <Input @bind-Value="_model.Name" Placeholder="Jane Doe" />
            <Label>Email</Label>
            <Input @bind-Value="_model.Email" Placeholder="jane@example.com" />
            <Label>Notes</Label>
            <Textarea @bind-Value="_model.Notes" />
        </Stack>
    </Body>
    <Footer>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Cancel</Button>
        <Button Type="Button.ButtonType.Submit">Save</Button>
    </Footer>
</OverlayForm>

@code {
    private ContactModel _model = new();
    private void HandleSave(EditContext ctx) { /* persist _model */ }
}

slots.name: Validator
slots.description: Override the default DataAnnotationsValidator with a custom validator (e.g. FluentValidationValidator).

mdSummary:
# OverlayForm

Overlay Form component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/overlay-form

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| OverlayForm | Model | `object?` | `` |  |
| OverlayForm | OnValidSubmit | `EventCallback<EditContext>` | `` |  |
| OverlayForm | OnInvalidSubmit | `EventCallback<EditContext>` | `` |  |
| OverlayForm | Header | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| OverlayForm | Body | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| OverlayForm | Footer | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| OverlayForm | Validator | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Override the default DataAnnotationsValidator with a custom validator (e.g. FluentValidationValidator). |
| OverlayForm | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| OverlayForm | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `Header` (OverlayForm) — RenderFragment slot
- `Body` (OverlayForm) — RenderFragment slot
- `Footer` (OverlayForm) — RenderFragment slot
- `Validator` (OverlayForm) — Override the default DataAnnotationsValidator with a custom validator (e.g. FluentValidationValidator).

## Events
- `OnValidSubmit` (`EventCallback<EditContext>`)
- `OnInvalidSubmit` (`EventCallback<EditContext>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<OverlayForm />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/OverlayForm/OverlayForm.razor`
